title: Salt and Soul Demo
description: This demo offers a first taste of the journey: climb and leap across the kitchen, chop fresh ingredients. A cozy, atmospheric slice of the full game to come.

title: The Letter Demo
description: The Letter is a narrative-driven psychological adventure set in a forgotten town. Explore abandoned streets, follow scattered notes and hidden messages, and uncover fragments of a story inspired by real events as you piece together a mystery buried in the past.

title: Educational Family Games Demo
description: Try the Steam Next Fest demo of Educational Family Games! Play Candy Land and 30 selected quick games from the full 80-game collection in a 1-4 player local multiplayer family party game, fully voiced in 19 languages.

title: 捉迷藏 - Hide and Seek Demo
description: 长泽小学的一年级女生结奈，和青梅竹马的好朋友真也约好了一起玩捉迷藏。但是，最近他们的身边似乎出现了可疑的人物，街道的氛围也变得紧张了起来。即便如此，今天放学后也要去公园玩捉迷藏哦……

title: MINERALS: Deep Core Mining Demo
description: Mine the vast underground and collect ores and gemstones—collect! collect! collect like crazy! “MINERALS: Deep Core Mining” is an over-the-top mining game with roguelite elements. Use the resources you gather to upgrade your abilities and take on an endless underground that changes with every run!

title: Happy My Friends Demo
description: Happy My Friends is an 8-player competitive multiplayer game where cute characters destroy each other blindly. In the demo version, the main game mode is available. Increase your rank and unlock new skins for characters and weapons.

title: Flame, Forest & Flood Demo
description: A cozy three-player strategy showdown where simple rules meet surprising depth. Easy to learn, endlessly re-playable, and built so everyone can play, and anyone can win.

title: Maid Cafe Simulator Demo
description: Become the new manager of a run-down maid cafe. Rebuild it with unique kemonomimi maids, each with their own secrets and personalities. Manage ingredients, serve customers, expand your shop, and chase the ultimate dream: the legendary Maidchelin 3-Star! Play the demo now and begin your journey!

title: Harpoon Arena Demo
description: A fast-paced top-down team shooter. The arena is split in half, limiting direct hero contact. Use a harpoon to pull enemies to your side and finish them with teammates! Accuracy and cold calculation will lead you to victory. Just avoid other harpoons flying from all directions...

title: Deep Breach Demo
description: Deploy orbital defenses, fuse experimental turret technologies, and engineer devastating weapon builds in a tactical sci-fi horde survival roguelike.

title: Typomagical Demo
description: Type and cast your own spells! Typomagical is a spell-casting roguelike with a twist: create and cast spells by typing incantations! Spells and the elements are at your fingertips, literally -- creative synergies are the key to victory!

title: BugFixer Demo
description: BugFixer is a 4-player co-op horror social deduction game where you must collect the bugs occurring in reality. As a specialized agent, your mission is to collect these bugs and survive until the end against both mysterious monsters and a hidden traitor among your teammates.

title: Killer Chase Demo
description: Killer Chase is a fast-paced retro quick time event arcade action game where every input matters. Complete rapid input sequences under pressure to outrun a relentless Killer.

title: Eatime Demo
description: Eatime is a hardcore time-management and logic puzzle game. Step into the role of a master chef and seamlessly weave together "active" hands-on prep with "passive" automated cooking. Optimize your timeline, eliminate idle seconds, and serve up culinary masterpieces in record time!

title: THE DEEPEST CASTLE Demo
description: You are a mighty knight - how powerful your blows are! And in the very center of a vast forest lies a fortress filled with evil and black magic. There, they raise the dead and hide great artifacts. You decide to explore the fortress and see what the black magicians are hiding.

title: Lucky Break Demo
description: In this roguelike deckbuilder you’re an addict. Deep in debt to the mob, a little drunk, and out of time. Just one more spin, and then you'll quit.

title: Grandpa Nightmare Demo
description: A tense escape game set inside a strange house ruled by a quirky but dangerous grandfather. Solve clever puzzles, avoid being caught, and face thrilling chase moments. Multiple endings await based on your choices. Can you outsmart the grandfather and escape the house?

title: Asteroid 69 Demo
description: Demo version limits all Game Modes to 20 levels. Master the controls for the unique ships and flex your aim against waves of diverse Asteroids while using a variety of special weapons.

title: Embers of the Uncrowned Demo
description: Embers of the Uncrowned is a dark fantasy MMORPG where fast-paced, satisfying isometric view combat meets brutal, gory visuals. In an epic tale drenched in human blood at the hands of elven invaders, embark on a journey to reignite the house's last ember of hope.

title: Till the End Demo
description: Earth has fallen. Recruit survivors in the ruins, activate their unique Power Suits, and fight back against endless alien hordes in this solo-developed sci-fi rogue lite wave shooter. Master Bushido blades, Centurion tanks, or Magi blasts — become unstoppable.

title: Hangin' Off! - Teaser demo
description: You’re sitting on an 80s racing motorcycle at the starting line of the Beginner Course. Your objective? Ride as far as possible before the timer reaches zero. How far can you make it?

title: NECHTO: Infection Protocol Demo
description: A card party game for 4 players with hidden roles and infection. One laptop on a shared screen, phones as controllers. No installs — just a browser and Wi-Fi.

title: Wadi Karma - وادي كرمة Alpha Demo
description: Wadi Karma is a 2D sandbox adventure game inspired by Arabian folklore, blending farming, exploration, and story-driven mystery in a forgotten desert world. Uncover the past. Reclaim the valley. And awaken the legacy of Jourya—before it’s lost forever.

title: Pinball Bounce 2d Demo
description: Bounce and fly through the air.....until gravity brings you back down. Play different levels and Gamble your hard earned gold away.

title: Florence Mirror Demo
description: Florence Mirror is a dark fantasy Action RPG set in modern Florence, where a hidden mirror dimension unleashes monstrous reflections of human sins. As Leonardo Tornabuoni, fight through 30+ bosses, master arcane powers, and choose between a story-driven path or a brutal Souls-like challenge.

title: MechShell Demo
description: Pilot S.H.E.L.L., a weaponized snail mechsuit, and defend the Overgrown Realms. Customize your shell, and squad up in 4-player co-op side-scrolling combat. Activate Battlefield Clarity to shift into first-person warfare.

title: Kernelbay Demo
description: A tiny, cozy idle fishing desktop companion about quiet progress, handcrafted islands, and stories hidden beneath the waves. Discover new species, upgrade your gear, customize your gears and let your fisher work peacefully in the background.

title: Masked Mayhem Demo
developer: Slap Chicken Games, Marco Del Rizzo

title: Silency: Cube 666 Demo
description: Try the CUBE 666 demo: read the counter on each door, deduce the safe route, open the next door in a timed run through a rotating mechanical cube, and survive spikes, electric shocks, fire, and falling.

title: Weather Roll Demo
description: Weather Roll is a turn-based roguelike deckbuilder. Wield rare Mana to awaken unique, charming plant girls, fend off monster hordes across four seasons. Use Weather Dice to rewind time, change weather, turn the tide in despair, and defend your last home!

title: Decked Out Demo
description: It is a 2D Rouge Like Deck Builder, where you need to open packs to gain more cards to use in your own run! Be aware as difficult enemies are there. Do not worry or give up, you will start winning slowly, and maybe not in your first turn!

title: Pirate İsland Demo
description: "Cook by day, defend by night! Trade your cutlass for a kitchen knife in this unique blend of restaurant management and intense combat. Feed the hungry, fight the past, and survive the legacy of Pirate Island."

title: Limit Breaker Demo
description: An idle clicker about training and breaking your limits! Gain power with every press, evolve into stronger forms, and push beyond your boundaries. Limit Breaker is currently in development — this is its official demo version on Steam.

title: Gooblings Demo
description: Fish a cozy pond with friends. Reel in creatures with randomized species, colors, patterns, and rare mutations — some wear tiny hats, some glow, some sprout wings. Breed new combos, display them in aquariums, and chase fish nobody has ever seen.

title: 2DOM! Demo
description: This is the DEMO for 2DOM! A Chill 2D sidescroller physics-based chain reaction puzzle game featuring dominoes!

title: HELLEVATORS Demo
description: HELLEVATORS is a fast-paced action-roguelike where you must jump, dash, slide and BLAST your way through Hell's public transit system. Make friends with weirdos, amass mystical knick-knacks and get frighteningly rich as you battle your way out of eternal damnation.

title: 23:61-Demo
description: "Who do you want to save? Or rather... who are you prepared to abandon?" A midnight "Unsend" trapped them in a rift in time, and awakened the dead "You." Become a "Ghost" inhabiting screens and surveillance feeds. Pry into perfect disguises and rotting hearts.

title: Land of Oblivion Demo
description: Explore a forgotten world through jumping, combat, and discovery. Land of Oblivion is a light-paced 2D action platformer with Metroidvania elements.

title: Evolution: Code of 6 Desires Demo
description: In this evolutionary simulation game, you play as a deity sowing the seeds of life. Each human you create possesses a unique genome, where the combination of desire genes determines their behavioral patterns and fate trajectory. A sandbox about life, choice, and destiny awaits your discovery.

title: Jiu‑Jitsu Hero! Flow Roll Demo
developer: (Yavo) Kie Yavorsky, Kie James Yavorsky, Jim West - Founder (Top Cyber Pro)

title: Phantasma Hotel Demo
description: Мрачная и безжалостная хоррор‑RPG с элементами roguelike. Пошаговые бои сталкиваются с истощающими ресурсами, а каждое возрождение меняется меняет окружение и цену ваших решений. 1980‑е, Пилигрим‑Сити, заброшенный отель, который помнит каждую смерть и каждую вашу ошибку.

title: Warfront Vanguard Demo
description: An action-packed tower defense where you face waves of enemies with unique strengths and weaknesses. Build and upgrade towers, adapt your strategy, and overcome increasingly powerful enemies in a dynamic mix of action and strategy.

title: Wordy Space Demo
description: Type words to blast incoming space threats, upgrade your ship and powers, master different dictionary packs, and climb global or language-specific Steam leaderboards.

title: Gun Goose Demo
description: The most realistic goose simulator ever made... Gun Goose is a fast-paced shooter where you play as a goose with guns. Use your arsenal and skills to fight through hordes of equally insane enemies on crazy maps, and get the highest scores you can on several game modes until your goose is cooked!

title: Lawn Mowing Simulator 2 Demo
description: The follow-up to Lawn Mowing Simulator! Check out this level that features brand new grass tech, the addition of leaf-blowing plus reworked systems based on player feedback to the original - plus licensed equipment from Kubota!

title: Altalis Demo
description: A puzzle Metroidvania game!

title: Draco Blade Demo
description: Draco Blade is a “Dragon-Action” game that combines exploration and combat within a land inhabited by dragons. Slash your way through the world, slice your foes, and discover where you came from in this blazing adventure!

title: Strange Finds Demo
description: Three thousand years ago, the legendary island of Mantas was lost to history. Today, you and your excavation team are digging on a tiny island where a shepherd has found some pottery... but you’re about to find something incredible.STRANGE FINDS is an adventure game inspired by the principles of real archaeology.

title: The Echo of MeMe-For You Adrift in the Sea of Reveries Demo
description: Welcome to the Meme Space—a dream of scattered fragments. Cross the plains, descend to the deep-sea city, link time, and ride to the Silver River. A denpa-style roaming text adventure, made for you.

title: Aleef: Desktop Pet Collector Demo
description: Work, browse, or play other games while hatching eggs in the background! Collect 300+ pets with various stats, unlock powerful upgrades, and build your battle team.

title: SANGUINE CYCLE; REDUX Demo
description: A narrative-driven thriller about missing people, stagnant towns, and the fact that even if you love someone, you can't always see the good sides of them when push comes to shove.

title: GRAIN ROT Demo
description: A horror co-op extraction builder set in a scorched wasteland where everything burns. Descend with your friends into shifting ruins, rip out furniture, and scavenge for loot before the Corrupted close in. Make it back alive, then rebuild the Outpost to better your chances for the next run.

title: Cat Mail Co. Demo
description: Run a cozy cat post office. Sort and deliver parcels from the daily boat, organizing everything your way. At night, the moon reveals hidden truths about packages. Clear a strange backlog, help locals, and unlock new abilities and destinations.

title: Life Sim : Shape your city (DEMO)
description: Build the city. Shape the society. Live the life. Wield absolute power over economy, trade, and demographics in this high-fidelity city builder sandbox demo. Prepare the ultimate living metropolis before stepping down to the pavement as a simulated citizen in Life Sim!

title: Pro Soccer Manager 27 Demo
description: Become the manager of a football team and take full control of your club. Manage scouting, training, facilities, and squad development. Choose your philosophy: focus on coaching and tactics, or invest in developing the next generation of stars. Success depends on your decisions.

title: Object Impermanence Demo
description: A first person puzzle game where your vision defines reality, and only the things you can see exist. Learn and master the strange behaviours of objects outside your vision. Traverse the ancient structures of a world forgotten by the universe.

title: Wreck Runners Demo
description: Try the demo of physics-based co-op extraction game for crews of 2-4 players. Venture into the twisted Bermuda Triangle aboard the ORCA, a hybrid utility craft that can fly, drive and dive. Gather loot, buy new equipment, and unlock cosmetics across chaotic runs.

title: After End Demo
description: This is the playable demo for After End, a First Person ARPG currently in development.

title: The Fish Corner Demo
description: In The Fish Corner, you run your own cozy pet fish shop and collect many unique breeds.Decorate your rooms and storefront, greet customers, and negotiate fair prices. Choose which fish you want to sell and which ones you want to keep for yourself.

title: Invaders Loop Demo
description: In Invaders Loop, which combines classic arcade spirit with roguelite mechanics, survive relentless waves of enemies raining down from the depths of space, dodge bullets, equip yourself with various items from the market, and defeat epic bosses.

title: Mythic Kart Maker Demo
description: Mythic Kart Maker is part level maker, part fantasy kart racer. Vehicular combat, whimsical characters, & a vibrant 64-bit pre-rendered art style come together to create a chaotic, creative playground where you build the race - and then survive it.

title: 4th & Goal Demo
description: 4th & Goal combines roguelite deckbuilding with American football. Make cuts, additions, and upgrades to your team through the Gauntlet Challenge!

title: Nytherra Demo
description: A cozy 2D adventure where you explore, gather resources, turn them into profit, craft, and battle enemies to save a fading world before time runs out.

title: Smokey Mike Demo
description: In stand-up, talent isn't always enough. In this point and click adventure you have to improvise, survive and fail with style until you craft the five minutes that could change everything.

title: WARD: Descent Demo
description: WARD: Descent is a 2D dungeon-crawler roguelike where you pilot an armored combat suit. Explore an overrun research laboratory, manage your suit's upgrades, and complete sequences to destroy anomalies. Descend to the bottom, pilot, and complete your mission! This demo features the first 2 floors!

title: KOTAMON: My Sis Found A Super-Rare Card In Her Cereal Box, So I Became A Garbage Man To Find The Entire Collection And Earn $1,000,000 Demo
Decline Demo
description: Welcome to your new night shift inside an abandoned underground drainage facility, you should handle the power problems nobody else wants to deal with. Your main task is simple: monitor the security cameras, manage your limited electricity, and survive until dawn. But don't HIDE, they see you.

title: Taddius and the Forbidden Bog Demo
description: In "Taddius and the Forbidden Bog", manage an inn for lost travellers, restore a ravaged bog, and find purpose in the most unexpected of places.

title: Big Golden Rock Demo
description: Big Golden Rock is a pixel incremental clicker about a huge golden rock. Gather resources, hire shooters and archers, build towers, launch rockets, summon UFOs, and unlock increasingly powerful upgrades.

title: Mass Edge - Gravity Ball Demo
description: Mass Edge Demo is a vibrant 3D puzzle-platformer inspired by the cult 90s classic Game, bringing back that unforgettable feeling of rolling, balancing, and thinking your way through impossible spaces.

title: Feed the Cat: Gravity Puzzle Demo
description: Move platforms, manipulate gravity, and solve relaxing physics puzzles to guide the food safely into the hungry cat's bowl. A cute, logic-based casual game where your main goal is simple: make sure the feline gets its treat!

title: Arcana, Gas & Waterworks Inc. Demo
description: The full set of game features through the first six levels of your fantasy utility career.

title: Travelling Home: Ever After Demo
description: Own a moving castle! A full-screen ambient idle game with built-in productivity tools. Travel a charming world in your train house. The perfect companion for study, work, creation, and sleep.

title: Streets of Miami VR Demo
description: Streets of Miami VR is a gritty 1980s crime-action VR game where you fight, drive, spray paint, shoot, hustle for money, and survive the streets of Miami in a open world sand box experience built for physical VR gameplay.

title: Dice Tech Dominion - Enter the Shadow Circuit Demo
description: Build your dice deck, shape the dungeon board, and command monsters in a 3D tactical dice battler.

title: Train Set Code Demo
description: Build a train set layout where everything runs on its own. Automate points and signals to direct the trains and keep them moving. Get creative and design a huge network that carries a fleet of trains.

title: Hellbridge Demo
description: Defend the last bridge to the living world in a relentless siege from Hell. Survive escalating waves, draft powerful spells, grow stronger with every run, and enter cursed gates to stop the invasion at its source.

title: Cubic Spree Demo
description: Cubic Spree is a fast-paced 2D shooter - Play locally and online with your friends, choose your weapons, and blast your way to victory with colorful chaos!

title: Iris Grid Demo
description: Match by color or value. Chain combos. Craft builds. Outsmart 40+ levels that twist the rules. A roguelite tile-matching strategy game where every match feeds a scoring engine you design. 120+ cores, items, and patches. No two runs play the same.

title: SCP: Antimemetics Division Demo
description: No, it's not your first day. The Amnestics have kicked in, and Site-48 has locked down. Scavenge restricted gear, gain clearance to forgotten levels, and bend reality to escape lethal SCP anomalies. Tactile survival horror where remembering too much will get you annihilated.

title: BLORBIT Demo
description: Flip gravity to climb. BLORBIT is a cute-creature vertical platformer climbing 6 biomes from meadow to deep space. Flip platforms only hold when gravity matches. Go Endless, chase Dailies, relax in Zen, or race 10 players online. How high can you climb?

title: Arc Salvo Demo
description: Arc Salvo is a fast-paced online turn-based artillery game featuring explosive team battles, a growing arsenal, and deep character customization.

title: The Murder Of Yesterday Demo
description: A psychological horror crime experience featuring Story mode and Anomaly mode. Where time is your only weapon.. travel back through fractured moments to stop a brutal crime before it happens uncover the truth, alter the outcome, and face the consequences of changing fate in a haunting reality.

title: SYSTEM_REBOOT Demo
description: Dive into the heart of a compromised mainframe in this psychological, meta-narrative bullet heaven. You are the Icarus Protocol, an advanced system cleaner tasked with purging catastrophic malware. But as the glitches intensify you'll soon realize that this is far more than just a simple simulation.

title: SHADE WALKERS Demo
description: A 2v2v2 horror escape royale set in a haunted school. Team up with your partner, gather ritual dolls, use items, avoid deadly entities, and outplay rival duos. Only one team can escape.

title: Gems are Mine, Slashes are Yours: Blood & Blessing Demo
description: A fast-paced 2D survival action roguelike where you bleed to fight, and she complains while healing. Consume your HP to smash through endless hordes, survive extreme resource swaps with a greedy AI cleric, and work a second job hunting bounties to pay for your skills!

title: 黯渊崛起 Demo
description: 这是一款RPG刷宝冒险游戏，内容丰富，多职业多次转职和觉醒成长、门派势力选择、宠物进化培养、宝石镶嵌——构建专属的深渊冒险。 几百种装备和独特道具自由搭配自由冒险，数百种技能机制各异玩法丰富，大量新的冒险地图等你来探索。

title: Agrocracy Demo
description: A farming management game focused on planning and numbers. This is not a farming sim - no driving, animals, or role-playing. Manage weather, labor, capital, and time on a large isometric map.

title: The Quiet After Demo
description: You play Ava, a would-be adventurer whose guild registration is only the first step into something far more dangerous, on the road ahead and beneath her own skin. A psychological, choice-driven visual novel where every decision shapes who she becomes.

title: Death's Life 2 Demo
description: In this demo you can try a physics-based puzzle game where you play as Death, creating “accidental” deaths through chain reactions. Solve scenarios in multiple ways or survive and escape from deadly trap-filled environments.

title: Scrap Isle Demo
description: Scrap-Isle is a short, incremental game where you sell trash to make loads of money, you earn levels and increase your trash production while fighting off enemies that want to take your trash from you, you can even hatch a variety of helpers to automate your money production!

title: TimelineTown-タイムラインタウン Demo
description: Invite friends to TimelineTown and grow your SNS together! Enjoy a relaxing sandbox-style simulation where numbers keep rising and new features unlock as your SNS levels up. Create trends, chat, and make posts go viral!

title: Level Up, Tiny King! Demo
description: Level Up, Tiny King! is a solo survivors-like auto-shooter platformer. After being kidnapped and thrown into the dungeons, you must fight your way upward. Survive relentless waves of cute enemies while climbing. Grow stronger, recruit magical buddies, and reclaim your throne.

title: Miniature LAND -Four Seasons- Demo
description: An escape room adventure set in a handcrafted miniature world. Can you find your way back home?

title: Summer Coming (夏天来了)  Demo
description: Summer Coming is a heartwarming pixel-story game that transports you back to university days, where you’ll experience a summer filled with friendship, budding romance, and personal growth. Through free exploration, interactive choices, and playful mini-games, you can write your own chapter of youth.

title: RETRIEVAL Demo
description: RETRIEVAL is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore a looping house, collect scattered memory fragments, and search extracted keywords in an old computer terminal to uncover a tragic truth.

title: Medieval Tavern Simulator Demo
description: Transform a run down tavern into the region's most popular gathering spot. Serve beer, manage your customers, and expand your business. Increase your profits while protecting your reputation, because every night brings new opportunities, surprises, and a touch of chaos to your doorstep.

title: BIBI DICE Demo
description: Roll eight dice, build scoring hands, stack multipliers, collect relics, and defeat enemies in a compact desktop portrait dice-building roguelite.

title: ReactFuse: Stolen Minds - Tech Demo
description: Originally developed to push the limits of a custom FPS engine, This is a playable technology showcase demonstrating real-time simulation of thousands of NPCs, a projectile-based ballistic system, and a dynamic sound system.

title: Van Tich Legends Demo
description: VẠN TÍCH LEGENDS DEMO IS OFFICIALLY OUT ON STEAM!Are you ready to rewrite Vietnamese fairy tales in the most intense and epic way possible? The official Demo of Vạn Tích Legends is now available on Steam (PC)! Step onto the fiery battlefield of mythical gods!What’s waiting for you in this Demo?

title: Lootborne Demo
description: Lootborne is a dark fantasy desktop autobattler. Build your character, loot gear, push through PvE stages, and challenge other players in async PvP duels while battle rages at the edge of your screen.

title: Mr. Nice Guy Demo
description: Play as the Final Girl and explore a haunted children's hospital in this PSX-style fixed-camera survival horror inspired by "Fatal Frame" and "Resident Evil". Hunt anomalies through a CCTV camera loop similar to "I'm on Observation Duty". Unravel an unsettling mystery, and escape a glitching entity.

title: 匣中少女的第二次末日 Demo
description: Infinite flow × mild horror × ensemble visual novel. Join this doomsday carnival together with the young girls~

title: Beyond Hatred Demo
description: Beyond Hatred (Demo) is a 2D ARPG where you follow Daran on his quest to rescue Alexia. Fight enemies, overcome obstacles, and gear up to survive in a hostile world filled with danger and challenges at every step.

title: Cursor Kingdom Demo
description: Record your actions and turn them into workers. Build an automated kingdom of cursor clones, optimize production chains, and survive enemy raids.

title: Tomo Cafe Demo
description: Tomo Cafe is a cozy, narrative-driven productivity game set in a relaxing study cafe. Set your real-life to-do list, work alongside energetic and chaotic focus buddies, and unlock heartfelt stories as you check off your goals.

title: Pinball Millionaire Demo
description: Pinball Millionaire is a physics-based marble simulation game. Let marbles bounce repeatedly off various objects to keep boosting your score, and finally guide them into the highest-multiplier scoring zone. Use the rewards you earn to upgrade and enhance the map continuously.

title: Neko Miko Kaibyo Shioki no Emaki Demo
description: "Neko Miko Kaibyo Shioki no Emaki" is an arcade-style action game where both allies and enemies are cats. Control the cat shrine maiden and her cat companions with the joystick, and run through the stages while defending against the fierce attacks of the monstrous cats with your feline companions.
